project: SICOT – Système Intégré de Coopération Internationale et de Traduction
currentSprintFocus: Sprint 10 (Paramètres Système Élargis, M10) built this session — 5 hardcoded settings migrated to the `parametres` table, Journal d'audit UI + PDF/Excel export shipped, AdminParametresPage reorganized. Sprint 9 (Portail Documentaire Externe) shipped earlier same day (47ef8b8) with a known route bug still open. Sprint 11 (Analytics & Rapports, M11) planned/backlogged, not started.
status: Sprints 1–5 + 8 + 9 COMPLETE ✅ (7a1de70, 47ef8b8). Server refactor pass COMPLETE ✅ (dd2809d). Sprint 10 (Paramètres Système Élargis) built this session — pending commit at cache-write time. Sprint 11 planned (47ffd94) — no code yet.

activeSession.task: Sprint 10 — Paramètres Système Élargis (M10): migrated 5 hardcoded settings into the `parametres` table (otp_expiration_minutes, lockout_max_tentatives, lockout_duree_minutes, backup_retention_locale_jours, backup_retention_nas_jours, deepl_fallback_actif) with a new idempotent seed service (`start/services/parameters-seed.service.ts`, called from `index.ts` before `app.listen` body runs) replacing the previously-planned 'seed via Drizzle migration' approach. Closed the Sprint-1-era Journal d'audit UI gap: new `AuditPage.tsx` (386 lines) replaces the `/audit` `ComingSoon` placeholder, plus PDF/Excel export (`utils/pdf.ts` — first use of puppeteer; `audit.export.service.ts`; `audit.controller.ts` exporterPDF/exporterExcel; capped at 10000 rows). `AdminParametresPage.tsx` reorganized into a per-module grid with human-readable labels. `deepl_fallback_actif` is resolved per-request now (not fixed at translate-service startup) — server passes `deepl_actif` in the request body, translate-service's `resoudre_deepl_actif()` falls back to its own env var if omitted; `verifierLibreTranslate()`/`verifierMoteur()` now also report `deeplConfigure` so the UI can warn if the toggle is on without an API key. See `sessions/2026-07-03.md` Sprint 10 section for full file-by-file detail.
activeSession.nextAction: Run `tsc --noEmit` on both packages, manually verify: audit export PDF/Excel download, OTP expiration / account lockout / backup retention actually read from `parametres` (not just default values), deepl_fallback_actif per-request toggle. Still-open from Sprint 9: fix `/portail` → `/portal` href bug in DocumentsPage.tsx (404), generate/apply a Drizzle migration for the Sprint 9 schema changes (portailTokens table + documents columns — currently hand-edited in schema.ts with no migration file). After that: Sprint 11 (M11 Analytics) is scoped but unbuilt — see docs/TASKS.md Sprint 11 section. Sprint 10's upload size/format limits item was deliberately deferred (not urgent).

quickRef.devCommand: npm run dev  (+ separately: cd packages/ocr-service && python main.py  +  cd packages/translate-service && python main.py)

stack.client: React 18 + Vite 5 + Tailwind v4 + framer-motion v12 + react-hook-form + zod + axios + TanStack Query
stack.server: Express 4 + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL + bcryptjs + jsonwebtoken + nodemailer + node-cron

criticalRules: NEVER run shadcn CLI — Tailwind v4 incompatibility
NEVER put transition inside framer-motion Variants objects
NEVER use CORS origin wildcard with credentials: true
ALWAYS use @/ path alias for client imports
ALWAYS use ANAC design tokens (bg-anac-navy), never raw hex
